alliance_duel_schedule.source: Last War: Survival - Alliance Duel Schedule by KIMORX (#931)
alliance_duel_schedule.description: Alliance Duel (VS) runs weekly. Each day has specific reward categories available. Plan your activities around the day's rewards to maximise value.

Monday.focus: Drone farming day — prioritise Drone Data and Drone Parts. Good day for gathering resources.

Tuesday.focus: Building day — use speedups and complete building tasks. UR Truck is high value.

Wednesday.focus: Research and tech day. Valor Badge is key for Versus Duel research tree — always claim.

Thursday.focus: Hero day — best day to push hero upgrades and spend Skill Medals. Hero Shards and Skill Medals are top priority.

Friday.focus: Biggest reward day of the week. Training + Building + Tech all active. Season 2 Overlord rewards available. Maximum activity day.

Saturday.focus: Speed and PvP day. Healing Speed and Unit Killed rewards make this the best day for combat and rallies.

strategic_notes: Friday is the most valuable day — maximise all activities: building, research, training
Thursday is the best day for hero investment — push star upgrades and skill medals on this day
Wednesday Valor Badge is critical for Versus Duel research tree — never skip
Monday Drone Parts and Data are essential for drone progression — always complete drone tasks
Saturday Unit Killed reward makes it ideal for boss attacks, rallies and PvP
Chip Chest unlocks from day 85 on Mondays — important for skill chip system after unlock
Season 2 Overlord rewards on Friday are exclusive to S2 — prioritise on that day
Weapon Shards on Thursday only available from Season 1 onwards
